howItWorks.intro: This pet insurance breakeven calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Net Value
rules.formula: Net = (Vet Bills - Deductible) × Reimbursement% - Annual Premium
rules.explanation: Reimbursement amount minus what you pay in premiums.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.a: It depends on your pet's health risks. Breeds prone to health issues benefit most.

faq.q: When does pet insurance break even?
faq.a: Typically when annual vet bills exceed premiums plus deductible.
